caption: A man in a dark suit, white shirt, and light-blue tie stands behind a dark green podium featuring the circular seal of the "PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES." He is positioned in front of two American flags and a blue background. To his left and right, floating digital overlays of the same flags and a golden eagle emblem are visible, each marked with small white plus signs. The scene is viewed through a screen that is placed on a white table, with a blue textured wall behind it. A small white shelf to the left holds a white bowl and a clock. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary behind the podium with a neutral expression, and there is no discernible movement or change in the environment, objects, or overlays across the frames.
